business.name: Mike's Garage Door Repair & Installation
business.tagline: When your door won't budge, we move

hero.headline: The garage door guy *Montgomery calls first*
hero.subheadline: Same day service, honest pricing, and we show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Doors that stick, springs that snap, openers that quit

services.title: Spring Replacement
services.description: Broken springs are dangerous. We handle the heavy lifting so you don't have to risk it.

services.title: Opener Repair & Install
services.description: Remote not working? Motor making noise? We fix all brands and install new ones.

services.title: Track & Cable Repair
services.description: Door off track or cables snapped? We get it rolling smooth again.

services.title: New Door Installation
services.description: Complete garage door replacement with professional installation and cleanup.

about.heading: Mike Strickland — Montgomery's garage door specialist
about.body: Real Montgomery business owner who answers his own phone. When your door breaks, we fix it right the first time.

reviews.name: Joey D.
reviews.text: Mike shows up when he says he will! Excellent work for a great price. He's done several jobs for me and I'm always more than satisfied.

reviews.name: Jamie W.
reviews.text: Service was top-notch from start to finish. Mike was professional, punctual, and knowledgeable. Had my door working like new in no time.

reviews.name: Xavier F.
reviews.text: Mike fixed our bent and off-track door for $500 less than the other quote! On time, detailed communication, took less than an hour.

cta.heading: Door acting up? Let's get it sorted
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and same-day service when you need it most.
